original_image_tags: A pinkish, aged paper slip with two punch holes at the bottom. The slip contains multiple stamped ink marks indicating receipt by the FBI, U.S. Department of Justice, and specific internal divisions. A handwritten note in black ink is present below the stamped text. There are faint traces of text from the reverse side bleeding through.

elements.description: Multiple blue and black ink stamps on pink paper. Top left: 'RECEIVED-TAMM / FBI / U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / AUG 8 9 56 AM '47'. Below it: 'RECEIVED / SEP 29 10 56 AM '47 / INTERNAL SECURITY / F. B. I. / DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Right side: 'AUG 8 11 17 AM '47 / RECEIVED-LADD / FBI / DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Center: handwritten text 'Rec'd 9/29/47 / 11:30 AM / JWA'.

judge.reason: The two descriptions provide conflicting specific verbatim text for the same stamps (e.g., Description A does not quote any specific stamp text, while Description B provides multiple distinct quoted strings, and the categories of text quoted are inconsistent between them).
